plugins.name: gamified-code-review
plugins.description: Gamified code review that turns PRs into towers with floors. Challenge mode for independent review, Scout mode for AI-guided review. Earn XP, RPG titles, and session badges.

plugins.name: loop-recipes
plugins.description: 10 autonomous recurring skills for /loop — self-healing debugger, content pipeline, work dispatcher, preference learner, plugin monitor, daily briefing, focus guardian, dependency sentinel, changelog writer, and ambient researcher.
